arts.ttl: Report: Marcel Sabitzer creates "bad energy" at Dortmund
arts.sum: Marcel Sabitzer is spoiling the atmosphere at Borussia Dortmund, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund can part ways with Niko Kovac if they fail to qualify for Europe
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund have the ability to part ways with current head coach Niko Kovac if they fail to qualify for Europe. Although Kovac only joined Dortmund earlier…

arts.ttl: FEATURE | Jamie Gittens: Why Borussia Dortmund’s English star is the key to beating Lille
arts.sum: There’s no use in sugarcoating it: it has been a nightmare season for Borussia Dortmund. One year after reaching the UEFA Champions League Final, BVB have hit rock bottom. They…

arts.ttl: Sky Germany: Can and Brandt's BVB futures in doubt, multiple players up for sale
arts.sum: The term 'rebuild' could be thrown around Dortmund again this summer as Sky Germany outlines a long list of candidates for sale.

arts.ttl: Report: Kovač's future at BVB hinges on club achieving goals
arts.sum: Die Schwarzgelben's boss has some interesting clauses in his current contact.

arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund’s search for an attacking midfielder has seemingly taken precedent in the last few months, with performances from both Germany international Julian Brandt and USMNT player Gio Reyna not…
